he following settings: In Internet Explorer: Go to Tools -> Internet Options -> Security. Click on the "Internet" Icon and set the slider to "Medium." In Firefox under Windows : Go to Tools -> Options Mac : Go to Firefox -> Preferences Then click on

Mac : Go to Firefox -> Preferences Then click on the Privacy tab. Under "History", "Firefox will" should be set to "Remember History". If "Use custom settings for history" is selected, then "Accept cookies from sites" should be selected. Still tro

cookies from sites" should be selected. Still trouble logging in? Check that the clock and timezone are set correctly on your computer. An incorrect timezone setting can cause your login cookie to be created with an expiration time that has already

e created with an expiration time that has already passed. If this happens, your username and password will be accepted, but the next page you see will probably tell you you are not logged in. Contact ©2002-2018 U.C. Regents
